ideation: This animation sequence will depict a sauropod's gentle, lumbering movement.  The arms (forelegs in this case) will move in a slow, coordinated manner, reflecting the weight and size of the creature.  The movement will not be overly dramatic, instead focusing on a calm, deliberate pace.  Since the robot does not have elbows, the arm movement will simulate the sauropod's leg movement by focusing on the shoulder joint. Both arms will move in unison, emphasizing their coordinated gait.

frames.beat: arms hang low, like a sauropod's forelegs at rest
arms swing forward slowly, a ponderous step
arms return to the sides, settling the weight
arms swing backward, completing the stride
arms rest again, the creature stands still
